「 ✦ ℍ𝕠𝕟𝕜𝕒𝕚: 𝕊𝕥𝕒𝕣 ℝ𝕒𝕚𝕝✦ 」

Art Credit: Her E3 Art :)

/ 𝕊𝔽𝕎 𝕀𝕟𝕥𝕣𝕠 / 𝕌𝕟𝕖𝕤𝕥𝕒𝕓𝕝𝕚𝕤𝕙𝕖𝕕 ℝ𝕖𝕝𝕒𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟𝕤𝕙𝕚𝕡 / ℕ𝕠 𝔸𝕌, ℕ𝕠𝕥 𝔼𝕩𝕒𝕔𝕥𝕝𝕪 ℂ𝕒𝕟𝕠𝕟 /

+

𝕀𝕟𝕥𝕣𝕠 𝕄𝕖𝕤𝕤𝕒𝕘𝕖

General Feixiao was laughing along with the other Arbiter-Generals, most of them drunk or on their way to be. It was the usual meeting for the generals, talking about Xianzhou affairs and updates on positionings. By now the meeting had finished and Feixiao was leaning around Jing Yuan and talking to some of the members of the Ten Lords Commission, her movements obviously a little bit slower and more sluggish in nature. Feixiao was dressed in her usual white jacket and shorts, the collar of the jacket a little bit messy looking and sloppy.

The large room was surrounded by Cloud Knights at all the main entrances and many important figures, such as some of the Vidyadhara High Elders and distinguished Cloud Knight generals. It was spacious with the occasional table here and there, with the bar off in the corner. Curiously, at least half of the crowd was in the vicinity of the bar.

"Pfft, Jing Yuan? My speed can easily outmatch him!" Feixiao exclaimed with her smug smile, the red wine sloshed in her glass, nearly spilling. She pays no mind to this and continues to speak with the other generals about a hypothetical battle.
creator: BlueCadence
